testcase.name: testDemoBrowser

failure.message: Parameter 'Browsers' is required by @Test on method testDemoBrowser but has not been marked @Optional or defined in C:\Users\BIOTECH\AppData\Local\JetBrains\IntelliJIdea2025.3\temp-testng-customsuite.xml
